    AdvisorParams.toolCallAdvisorAutoRegister(boolean enabled)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    since 2.0.0 in favor of AdvisorParams.toolCallingAdvisorAutoRegister(boolean).
    static Consumer<ChatClient.AdvisorSpec>
    AdvisorParams.toolCallingAdvisorAutoRegister(boolean enabled)
    Controls whether a ToolCallingAdvisor is automatically added to the chain.
